steps: File French Tax Administration Form 5001 to reclaim EUR 3,744.00 overpaid withholding tax on TotalEnergies SE dividends
Submit evidence to BNP Paribas Securities showing FR-NO treaty rate should be 15% not 13.5% applied
Include Norwegian tax residency certificate and account 901234567 dividend statement as supporting documentation
Follow up with both custodian and French tax authorities within 30 days for expedited processing

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
